summary: The chapter centers on the formation of a team, specifically involving Kim Ha-Jin. Chae Na-Yoon, after much internal deliberation about her intentions, decides to recruit Kim Ha-Jin and has already submitted their names as a team. This unexpected move surprises Kim Ha-Jin and leaves Rachel feeling deeply disappointed and rejected, as she believed she had a strong connection with Kim Ha-Jin and wonders why she was not chosen.
key_moments: Chae Na-Yoon internally debates approaching Kim Ha-Jin to form a team, worried he might misinterpret her intentions.
Chae Na-Yoon officially asks Kim Ha-Jin to team up, revealing she has already submitted their names together.
Rachel expresses profound disappointment and confusion, questioning why Kim Ha-Jin chose Chae Na-Yoon over her.
